title: GensProY
description: A generator plugin hook into paperx
body:
GensProY - Advanced Generator System

GensProY transforms your Minecraft economy server with a powerful, fully customizable generator system that players will love. Place generators throughout your world to automatically produce valuable in-game currency and gems over time.
Features

🌈 Visually Distinct Generators

Each generator level has a unique colored glass block appearance

Instantly identify generator levels by their color

Clean, compact design that takes up minimal space in your world

💰 Progressive Income System

Generators automatically produce money and gems at configurable intervals

Higher-level generators produce more valuable currency denominations

Configurable spawn rates and custom drop commands

⚙️ Deep Customization

Configure up to 15 generator levels (or more!)

Set unique upgrade costs, production rates, and drop types for each level

Full control over currency/gem spawn chances and denominations | Default usage: PAPERX

🏆 Advanced Player Progression

Players can upgrade generators by shift-right-clicking

Economy-integrated upgrade system with configurable costs

Permission-based and command-based generator slot system

🧩 Full Server Integration

PlaceholderAPI support for scoreboard and GUI integration

Compatible with any economy plugin that uses Vault

Works seamlessly with existing spawned currency/item collection plugins

Commands


/gengive <level>Give yourself a generator of specified 

/genslots <player> <amount>Give a player additional generator 

Additional slot permissions:

gensproy.slots.2 - Gives player 2 extra generator slots

gensproy.slots.4 - Gives player 4 extra generator slots

gensproy.slots.6 - Gives player 6 extra generator slots

gensproy.slots.all - Gives player maximum extra generator slots

PlaceholderAPI Support

%gensproy_gens_placed%Shows current number of generators placed by the player

%gensproy_gens_limit%Shows the maximum number of generators the player can place

%gensproy_gens_remaining%Shows how many more generators the player can place

%gensproy_gens_progress%Shows the player's placed generators as a fraction of their limit

%gensproy_gens_percent%Shows the percentage of the player's generator limit used

%gensproy_gens_base_limit%Shows the base generator limit

%gensproy_gens_perm_bonus%Shows bonus generator slots from permissions

%gensproy_gens_extra_slots%Shows extra generator slots from commands

Installation

Make sure you have a compatible economy plugin that works with Vault

Install PlaceholderAPI (recommended, but optional)

Drop the GensProY plugin into your plugins folder

Start your server to generate the default configuration

Customize the config.yml file to your liking

Restart your server and start using generators!

Configuration

GensProY offers extensive configuration options. Every aspect of the generators can be customized:

Base generator limit per player

Maximum generator level

Upgrade costs for each level

Currency and gem spawn commands

Generator appearance for each level

Money and gem denominations based on level

Spawn times and rates

**Best with: PAPERX - PREMIUM EDITION found on the organization's premium plugin hub, minecraftplugins.org**
